name: Almond Logs Dipped in Chocolate
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. Line cookie sheets with parchment paper.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine the butter and almond paste. Beat on low speed until well mixed.
4. Add the powdered sugar, egg yolks, almond extract, and vanilla extract. Beat on medium speed until well mixed.
5. Reduce speed to low. Gradually add the flour, scraping the bowl often, until well mixed.
6. Place dough in a pastry bag with a 1/2-inch opening.
7. Pipe onto cookie sheets, forming logs that are 2-3 inches long.
8. Bake for 13-17 minutes, or until edges are lightly browned. Cool completely on parchment paper.
9. In a 1-quart saucepan, melt chocolate chips and shortening over low heat, stirring often until smooth.
10. Remove cooled cookies from parchment paper and dip ends or tops in melted chocolate, then in chopped almonds.
11. Place on waxed paper to set.
